calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter S. Hwu, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Urbano Lozano, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Sharechive, LLC.
Default entered on January 8, 2008.
Amended default entered on January 31, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on January 31, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Urbano Lozano, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Sharechive, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $49,725.52.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,171.41.
Costs $375.00, for a total of $56,271.93.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
